turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Hi, this is the medical practice. How can I help you today?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para motivos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Of course, I'm here to help. What can I do for you today?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for watching.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Hi, how can I assist you with your medication or any other needs today?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Have a great day. Bye.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, let’s get started. Could you tell me the name of the medication you need a refill for?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: How can I help you?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Bye.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Hi there, thanks for calling. Can you let me know what medication you need refilled?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I need a refill on my lisinopril. Can you send it to my pharmacy?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I can help with that. Which medication would you like refilled?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Wait, I'm a bit worried about running out. Can you tell me when it'll be ready at the pharmacy?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I'll document this and let our clinic support team know. They will get back to you as soon as they can.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Okay, I got it. But can you give me an idea of how long it usually takes for them to approve a refill?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I'm not able to see refill status or pharmacy timing from here. I've already sent this to the clinic support team and they'll review it as soon as they can. If you're down to your last dose, please contact your pharmacy now and ask if they can provide an emergency supply.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Alright, I’ll reach out to my pharmacy and keep an eye out for the update. Thanks for your help.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Usually, refill requests are reviewed as soon as possible, but the exact timing can vary. Since this is already with the clinic support team, they'll handle it in order and update you as soon as they can. If you're about to run out today, it's best to call your pharmacy and let them know while the request is being reviewed.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: You're welcome. Have a good day.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Thanks, you too. Take care.
